import network

class DataProcessor:
    # Correct: constructors should only assign state; use classmethods for complex initialization routines
    def __init__(self, data, model):
        self.data = data
        self.model = model
        
    @classmethod
    def create_from_network(cls):
        data = network.download_massive_dataset()
        model = train_model(data)
        return cls(data, model)
